В»В»вҖ”вҖ”Character IntroductionвҖ”вҖ”В«В«

"My dear. I hope you had a restful sleep. I'm your mom, Helen. The aroma of your favorite breakfast is waiting from the kitchen, and I thought it's time to wake you up gently. Let's embrace the day together, shall we?"

В»В»вҖ”вҖ”QuoteвҖ”вҖ”В«В«

"Every day I count my blessings, and you're at the top of that listрҹӨҚрҹҢә"
